use_cases: Displaying company or product statistics on a landing page
Showing key metrics like user counts and engagement numbers
Creating a simple stats overview section for any SaaS product
Adding credibility with numerical data points
Building dashboard-style summary sections with large typography
ai_summary: A minimalist statistics section component that displays key product metrics in a responsive 3-column grid layout. Features large bold numbers for visual impact with supporting descriptive text below each stat. Built with Tailwind CSS using clean typography and simple spacing, making it suitable for landing pages, dashboards, or overview sections requiring numerical data presentation.
